description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CTest (Windows) that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main, ignoring certain paths. The workflow should use a Windows 2022 environment with read permissions to repository contents. It should then perform a matrix build with various tool versions, build types, and architectures, checking out the repository, cloning a test repository, installing Ninja, setting up the MSVC dev environment, configuring and building with CMake, and cleaning up.
